sections.subtitle: Team Form
sections.text: SC Freiburg are in strong form, unbeaten in their last 5 matches with 4 wins and 1 draw, scoring consistently. Eintracht Frankfurt also show resilience, unbeaten in their last 4 matches with 1 win and 3 draws, including a strong 4-0 win over RB Leipzig. Both teams have demonstrated attacking intent recently.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, Eintracht Frankfurt dominated with a 4-1 win, while the other game ended in a 3-3 draw. Both matches saw high-scoring outcomes with both teams scoring in each encounter, indicating a trend of open, attacking play between these sides.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Freiburg (4th, 55 points) and Frankfurt (3rd, 57 points) are closely matched in the standings. Frankfurt have a stronger attack (65 goals scored vs Freiburg’s 48), but Freiburg’s defense is comparable (50 conceded vs Frankfurt’s 45). Freiburg’s home form and Frankfurt’s away resilience suggest a tight contest.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Tactics
sections.text: Freiburg’s Vincenzo Grifo (8 goals, 11 assists) and Ritsu Doan (9 goals) are key attacking threats, while Frankfurt rely on Hugo Ekitiké (15 goals, 7 assists). Freiburg may exploit set-pieces (3rd in headers scored), while Frankfurt’s late-game scoring (high % of goals after 60 minutes) could be decisive.
